extension.description: Monitor Ascend NPU status on SSH hosts from Windows or WSL.
command.subscribe: NPU Monitor: Subscribe to Idle Notification
command.unsubscribe: NPU Monitor: Unsubscribe from Idle Notification
configuration.title: NPU Monitor
configuration.sshConfigPath: SSH configuration path. Leave empty to use remote.SSH.configFile first, then detect it automatically.
configuration.knownHostsPath: known_hosts path. Leave empty to use the file beside the SSH configuration.
configuration.sshExecutablePath: SSH executable path. Leave empty to use Windows OpenSSH or /usr/bin/ssh.
configuration.exporterProbeTimeoutSecond: Total timeout for probing NPU-Exporter metrics.
configuration.excludedHosts: SSH Host aliases excluded from the monitor.
configuration.idleScope: Whether all cards or any card must be idle.
configuration.idleScope.allCards: All healthy cards must be idle.
configuration.idleScope.anyCard: At least one healthy card must be idle.
configuration.idleRequireNoProcesses: Require no NPU process when deciding whether a card is idle.
configuration.idleConsecutiveChecks: Consecutive qualifying scans required before reporting idle.
